headline: ALK Issues Bearish Q1 View on High Fuel Costs & Operational Issues
summary: Alaska Air cuts Q1 outlook as fuel costs surge and disruptions hit demand, widening expected losses despite steady revenue trends.

raw.headline: ALK Issues Bearish Q1 View on High Fuel Costs & Operational Issues
raw.summary: Alaska Air cuts Q1 outlook as fuel costs surge and disruptions hit demand, widening expected losses despite steady revenue trends.

headline: Air Lease Wins Final Regulatory Nod for Merger, Expects Closure Soon
summary: AL secures final regulatory approval for its merger, targets April 8 close with $65 per share payout and a rebrand to Sumisho Air Lease.

raw.headline: Air Lease Wins Final Regulatory Nod for Merger, Expects Closure Soon
